articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games

keyEvents.text: Substitution, Belize. Jovaunn Ramos replaces Jordy Polanco because of an injury.
First Half ends, Belize 0, French Guiana 0.
Substitution, Belize. Andir Chi replaces Nahjib Guerra.
Substitution, Belize. Horace Ávila replaces Warren Moss.
Yannis Letard (French Guiana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, French Guiana. Yvelin Nozile replaces Thomas Némouthé.
Substitution, Belize. Norman Anderson replaces Allan Barillas.
Substitution, Belize. Deshawon Nembhard replaces Evral Trapp.
Substitution, French Guiana. Joël Sarrucco replaces Arnold Abelinti.
Goal!  Belize 1, French Guiana 0. Pele Martínez (Belize) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Eldon Reneau with a cross   following a corner.
Second Half ends, Belize 1, French Guiana 0.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Attempt saved. Arnold Abelinti (French Guiana) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jean-David Legrand with a cross.
